# Sales Executive Performance Dashboard (Excel Project)

## Project Overview

This project presents an Excel-based dashboard analyzing the performance of sales executives. The objective is to track revenue generation, evaluate individual performance, and identify trends to support data-driven decision making.

## Tools and Technologies

* Microsoft Excel
* Data Analysis
* Data Visualization (Charts and Pivot Tables)

## Dashboard Features

* Individual sales performance tracking
* Revenue generated by each sales executive
* Target vs actual performance comparison
* Overall sales performance summary
* Interactive filtering using slicers

## Key Insights

* Identified top-performing sales executives based on revenue
* Highlighted underperforming executives requiring attention
* Compared actual sales against targets to evaluate efficiency
* Observed variations in performance across individuals

## Key Metrics

* Total Revenue
* Target Achievement Percentage
* Sales by Executive
* Performance Comparison

## What I Learned

* Creating dashboards using Excel Pivot Tables and Charts
* Designing performance tracking systems
* Analyzing sales data for business insights
* Presenting data in a structured and interactive format

## Business Value

* Helps evaluate individual sales performance
* Supports performance-based decision making
* Identifies top contributors and improvement areas
* Enables better sales strategy planning
